# Berichtsteil

## Abschnitt

Dies ist ein kurzer Beispieltext für DOCX, Typst/PDF und HTML. Die Präsentationsformate nutzen dieselbe Quelle, aber eine andere visuelle Umsetzung.

## Tabelle

| Bereich | Status |
|---|---:|
| RevealJS | wichtig |
| PPTX | Referenzvorlage |
| DOCX | Word-nah |
| Typst | PDF-nah |


| Variable | Description | Scale / Coding | Example value |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `student_id` | Anonymous student identifier | Text | `S042` |
| `condition` | Experimental condition assigned to the student | PS-I / I-PS | `PS-I` |
| `pretest_score` | Score before the intervention | 0–20 points | 11 |
| `posttest_score` | Score after the intervention | 0–20 points | 16 |
| `gain_score` | Difference between posttest and pretest | Points | 5 |
| `engagement_home` | Self-reported engagement during home preparation | 1–5 Likert scale | 3.8 |
| `engagement_class` | Self-reported engagement during in-class activities | 1–5 Likert scale | 4.4 |
| `cognitive_load` | Perceived cognitive load after the lesson | 1–7 Likert scale | 5.2 |
| `conceptual_understanding` | Score on conceptual transfer items | 0–10 points | 7 |
| `time_on_task` | Total time spent on assigned activities | Minutes | 48 |
| `notes` | Optional qualitative observation or comment | Text | `Worked actively in group phase` |

: Descriptive overview of variables used in the study

# Berichtsteil

## Abschnitt

Dies ist ein kurzer Beispieltext für DOCX, Typst/PDF und HTML. Die Präsentationsformate nutzen dieselbe Quelle, aber eine andere visuelle Umsetzung.

## Tabelle

| Bereich | Status |
|---|---:|
| RevealJS | wichtig |
| PPTX | Referenzvorlage |
| DOCX | Word-nah |
| Typst | PDF-nah |


| Variable | Description | Scale / Coding | Example value |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `student_id` | Anonymous student identifier | Text | `S042` |
| `condition` | Experimental condition assigned to the student | PS-I / I-PS | `PS-I` |
| `pretest_score` | Score before the intervention | 0–20 points | 11 |
| `posttest_score` | Score after the intervention | 0–20 points | 16 |
| `gain_score` | Difference between posttest and pretest | Points | 5 |
| `engagement_home` | Self-reported engagement during home preparation | 1–5 Likert scale | 3.8 |
| `engagement_class` | Self-reported engagement during in-class activities | 1–5 Likert scale | 4.4 |
| `cognitive_load` | Perceived cognitive load after the lesson | 1–7 Likert scale | 5.2 |
| `conceptual_understanding` | Score on conceptual transfer items | 0–10 points | 7 |
| `time_on_task` | Total time spent on assigned activities | Minutes | 48 |
| `notes` | Optional qualitative observation or comment | Text | `Worked actively in group phase` |
